summary: Completed testing of Iteration 22 features: CricketData.org API integration, ConsultantDashboard component split, Compare Dashboard, and APScheduler background auto-scraping. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns scheduler status (active: true, next_runs: 4PM/7PM IST)
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live tries CricketData.org API first, falls back to Claude web scraping
Backend: GET /api/predictions/{matchId}/pre-match returns cached algorithm prediction
Backend: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/claude-analysis returns cached Claude analysis (does NOT trigger generation)
Backend: GET /api/schedule returns matches for Compare page
Backend: GET /api/cricket-api/usage returns API usage tracking
Backend: GET /api/cricket-api/cached returns cached live data (no API hit)
Backend: Batch prediction fetch works for Compare page
Backend: Prediction structure has required fields for Compare page
Backend: fetch-live returns source field (cricketdata.org, claude_web_search, or none)
Backend: APScheduler configured with auto_scrape_live_matches every 5 minutes
Backend: APScheduler configured with promote_matches_to_live at 4PM and 7PM IST
Frontend: Header has COMPARE nav tab linking to /compare
Frontend: Compare page loads with 'ALGORITHM vs CLAUDE OPUS' header
Frontend: Compare page shows summary strip (Matches Compared, Same Winner, Disagreements, Agreement %)
Frontend: Compare page shows 15 match compare cards with side-by-side Algorithm vs Claude predictions
Frontend: Compare cards show agreement level (HIGH/MODERATE/LOW)
Frontend: PreMatch page shows Algorithm Prediction section (11 factors)
Frontend: PreMatch page shows Claude Opus Analysis section below Algorithm
Frontend: LiveMatch page has Claude tab in right panel
Frontend: ConsultantDashboard imports from ConsultantWidgets.js and ChatBox.js
Frontend: ConsultantWidgets.js exports: WinGauge, SignalBadge, EdgeMeter, EdgeReasons, DriversPanel, PlayerImpact, UncertaintyBand, SimulationSummary
Frontend: ChatBox.js renders chat interface with input and submit button
Frontend: All consultation widgets render after running consultation (WinGauge, SignalBadge, SimulationSummary, DriversPanel, BettingScenarios, PlayerImpact)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly implements CricketData.org API as primary source with Claude web scraping fallback in fetch_live_data endpoint
APScheduler properly configured with AsyncIOScheduler for background auto-scraping every 5 minutes
ConsultantDashboard.js correctly imports from ConsultantWidgets.js and ChatBox.js (component split complete)
ConsultantWidgets.js exports all 8 widget components with proper data-testid attributes
ChatBox.js is a standalone component with chat functionality
ComparisonDashboard.js fetches schedule and batch-loads cached predictions via GET (not POST)
Header.js has COMPARE nav item with Scales icon linking to /compare
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_008 (MI vs DC) with cached predictions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 features fully working: (1) CricketData.org API is primary source for live data, Claude web scraping is fallback. (2) ConsultantDashboard split into ConsultantWidgets.js (8 widgets) and ChatBox.js. (3) Compare page at /compare shows Algorithm vs Claude predictions side-by-side with agreement metrics. (4) APScheduler runs auto_scrape_live_matches every 5 minutes and promote_matches_to_live at 4PM/7PM IST. Match ipl2026_008 has cached algorithm prediction and Claude analysis.

cricketdata_api_primary.verification: Response includes source field indicating data source

claude_fallback.description: Falls back to Claude web scraping if CricAPI has no data
claude_fallback.verification: source field shows 'claude_web_search' when CricAPI unavailable

cached_prediction_get.description: GET /api/predictions/{matchId}/pre-match returns cached prediction without triggering
cached_prediction_get.verification: Returns cached data or null, does not generate new prediction

cached_claude_get.description: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/claude-analysis returns cached analysis without triggering
cached_claude_get.verification: Returns cached data or null, does not generate new analysis

compare_page.description: Compare page at /compare shows Algorithm vs Claude predictions
compare_page.verification: Page loads with header, summary strip, and 15 match compare cards

compare_summary_strip.description: Summary strip shows Matches Compared, Same Winner, Disagreements, Agreement %
compare_summary_strip.verification: All 4 metrics visible in summary strip

header_compare_tab.description: Header navigation has COMPARE tab linking to /compare
header_compare_tab.verification: Nav item visible with Scales icon

consultant_component_split.description: ConsultantDashboard imports from ConsultantWidgets.js and ChatBox.js
consultant_component_split.verification: All widgets render correctly after running consultation

apscheduler_auto_scrape.verification: Scheduler active in health endpoint, job configured in startup

prematch_both_sections.description: PreMatch page shows Algorithm Prediction AND Claude Opus Analysis

livematch_claude_tab.description: LiveMatch page has Claude tab in right panel
livematch_claude_tab.verification: Tab visible among Consult, Claude, Live API, Models, Odds, Squad, Players
